template_info.name: OpenChronicle Character Template
template_info.description: Adaptable character profile template for import and manual creation
template_info.purpose: Provides comprehensive character creation with expandable arrays and optional field management
template_info.optional_fields: Any field marked with '_optional': true can be safely deleted
template_info.usage: Delete entire fields/sections with '_optional': true, or just the '_optional' key to make field required

import_adaptability.arrays_expandable: All arrays can contain any number of entries - template shows minimum structure
import_adaptability.dynamic_relationships: Relationship types can be family, friend, enemy, lover, mentor, rival, etc.
import_adaptability.unlimited_modifications: Physical modifications and personal items arrays can grow as needed
import_adaptability.flexible_structure: Import processes should expand arrays and adapt field counts dynamically

application_behavior.empty_optional_fields: Application will automatically ignore optional fields that are empty, null, or contain only placeholder values
application_behavior.unused_optional_fields: Optional fields left as {{PLACEHOLDER}} values will be treated as unused and ignored
application_behavior.processing_logic: Only populated optional fields with actual content will be processed by the application

values._comment: Array can expand - add as many values as needed

fears._comment: Array can expand - add as many fears as needed

motivations._comment: Array can expand - add as many motivations as needed

significant_events._comment: Array can expand - add as many significant events as needed

skills._comment: Array can expand - add as many skills as needed

magical_abilities._comment: Array can expand - add as many magical abilities as needed

weaknesses._comment: Array can expand - add as many weaknesses as needed

relationships._comment: Array can expand - add as many relationships as needed. Types include: family, friend, enemy, lover, mentor, rival, colleague, etc.

key_scenes._comment: Array can expand - add as many key scenes as needed

speech_patterns._comment: Array can expand - add as many speech patterns as needed

catchphrases._comment: Array can expand - add as many catchphrases as needed

emotional_triggers._comment: Array can expand - add as many triggers as needed

emotional_tells._comment: Add more emotional states as needed

specialized_details._comment: All arrays in this section can expand to accommodate any number of entries

tattoos._comment: Array can expand - add as many tattoos as needed

scars._comment: Array can expand - add as many scars as needed

piercings._comment: Array can expand - add as many piercings as needed

other_modifications._comment: Array can expand - add as many other modifications as needed

personal_items._comment: Array can expand - add as many personal items as needed
personal_items.name: {{ITEM_NAME}}
